description:
Configure a Webhook integration in ADAudit Plus to forward alerts to a SOAR platform.

Login Credentials:
- Username: admin
- Password: Admin@2024

Create a new Webhook Profile named 'SOAR_Integration' with the following settings:
- Method: POST
- Webhook URL: 'https://soar-api.corp.local/v1/ingest/adaudit'
- Headers: Key='x-api-key', Value='sk-9982-secure-token'
- Data Type: JSON
- Payload/Body: 
  {
    "source": "ADAuditPlus",
    "alert": "%ALERT_NAME%",
    "user": "%USER_NAME%",
    "severity": "%SEVERITY%",
    "message": "%MESSAGE%"
  }
(Note: Use the appropriate macro/variable syntax available in the UI for the fields like Alert Name, User Name, etc.)
